languages.text: {n}В импровизированном госпитале царит суета. Тут и там стонут сквозь зубы раненные. Мужчина с повязкой хирургеона и лейтенантскими погонами склонился над одной из коек, осматривая пациента, пока рядом мечется молодой ассистент в звании сержанта.{/n}

{n}The makeshift hospital is a hive of activity. Here and there, the wounded moan through gritted teeth. A man wearing a chirurgeon's armband and a lieutenant's insignia stands at one bed examining a patient, while a young assistant with the rank of sergeant rushes about.{/n}

{n}The makeshift hospital is a hive of activity. Here and there, the wounded moan through gritted teeth. A man wearing a chirurgeon's armband and a lieutenant's shoulder boards stands at one bed examining a patient, while a young assistant with the rank of sergeant rushes about.{/n}

{n}The makeshift hospital is a hive of activity. Here and there, the wounded moan through gritted teeth. A man wearing a chirurgeon's armband and a lieutenant's insignia stands at one bed examining a patient, while a young assistant with the rank of sergeant rushes about.{/n}

{n}The makeshift hospital is a hive of activity. Here and there, the wounded moan through gritted teeth. A man wearing a chirurgeon's armband and a lieutenant's insignia stands at one bed examining a patient, while a young assistant with the rank of sergeant rushes about.{/n}

languages.text: {n}仮設病院は活気に満ちている。あちこちで、負傷者たちが歯を食いしばってうめいている。軍医の腕章と中尉の肩章を付けた男が、あるベッドの傍らで患者を診ており、軍曹の階級章を付けた若い助手が慌ただしく走り回っている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The makeshift hospital is a hive of activity. Here and there, the wounded moan through gritted teeth. A man wearing a chirurgeon's armband and a lieutenant's shoulder boards stands at one bed examining a patient, while a young assistant with the rank of sergeant rushes about.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 仮設病院は活気に満ちている。あちこちで、負傷者たちが歯を食いしばってうめいている。軍医の腕章と中尉の肩章を付けた男が、あるベッドの傍らで患者を診ており、軍曹の階級章を付けた若い助手が慌ただしく走り回っている。

languages.text: {n}L'hôpital de fortune fourmille d'activité. Ici et là, les blessés gémissent à travers leurs dents serrées. Un homme portant le brassard d'un chirurgeon et l'insigne d'un lieutenant se tient devant un lit, en train d'examiner un patient, pendant qu'un jeune assistant au grade de sergent s'affaire.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The makeshift hospital is a hive of activity. Here and there, the wounded moan through gritted teeth. A man wearing a chirurgeon's armband and a lieutenant's insignia stands at one bed examining a patient, while a young assistant with the rank of sergeant rushes about.{/n}

Un homme portant le brassard d'un chirurgeon et l'insigne d'un lieutenant se tient devant un lit, en train d'examiner un patient, pendant qu'un jeune assistant au grade de sergent s'affaire.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Derme çatma hastane, arı kovanı gibi işliyor. Orada burada yaralılar, sıkılı dişlerinin arasından inliyor. Cerrah pazubendi ve teğmenlik nişanını takan bir adam, yatak başında hastayı muayene ediyor. O sırada çavuş rütbesindeki genç bir asistan da etrafta koşuşturuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The makeshift hospital is a hive of activity. Here and there, the wounded moan through gritted teeth. A man wearing a chirurgeon's armband and a lieutenant's insignia stands at one bed examining a patient, while a young assistant with the rank of sergeant rushes about.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Derme çatma hastane, arı kovanı gibi işliyor. Orada burada yaralılar, sıkılı dişlerinin arasından inliyor. Cerrah pazubendi ve teğmenlik nişanını takan bir adam, yatak başında hastayı muayene ediyor. O sırada çavuş rütbesindeki genç bir asistan da etrafta koşuşturuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das improvisierte Krankenhaus gleicht einem Bienenstock. Überall stöhnen Verwundete durch zusammengebissene Zähne. Ein Mann mit der Armbinde eines Chirurgen und den Abzeichen eines Lieutenants untersucht einen Patienten, während ihm ein junger Assistent im Rang eines Sergeants zur Seite steht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The makeshift hospital is a hive of activity. Here and there, the wounded moan through gritted teeth. A man wearing a chirurgeon's armband and a lieutenant's insignia stands at one bed examining a patient, while a young assistant with the rank of sergeant rushes about.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das improvisierte Krankenhaus gleicht einem Bienenstock. Überall stöhnen Verwundete durch zusammengebissene Zähne. Ein Mann mit der Armbinde eines Chirurgen und den Abzeichen eines Lieutenants untersucht einen Patienten, während ihm ein junger Assistent im Rang eines Sergeants zur Seite steht.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El hospital improvisado es un hervidero de actividad. Los heridos gimen entre dientes por todas partes Un hombre con brazalete de cirujano e insignia de teniente se encuentra junto a una cama examinando a un paciente, mientras un joven ayudante con rango de sargento corretea por la sala.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The makeshift hospital is a hive of activity. Here and there, the wounded moan through gritted teeth. A man wearing a chirurgeon's armband and a lieutenant's insignia stands at one bed examining a patient, while a young assistant with the rank of sergeant rushes about.{/n}

Los heridos gimen entre dientes por todas partes Un hombre con brazalete de cirujano e insignia de teniente se encuentra junto a una cama examinando a un paciente, mientras un joven ayudante con rango de sargento corretea por la sala.{/n}

languages.text: {n}临时医院里一派繁忙，四处是伤兵忍痛的呻吟声。一名戴着船医臂章、佩着中尉徽章的男子站在病床前检视伤员，一名军士衔的年轻助手则在旁奔走忙碌。{/n}

A man wearing a chirurgeon's armband and a lieutenant's insignia stands at one bed examining a patient, while a young assistant with the rank of sergeant rushes about.{/n}
